specific_question: How does Elexion's reported customer satisfaction rate on warranties compare to the industry standard of 75%?
answer: Since 2022, Elexion leads the industry with a higher than 80% satisfaction rate on its warranties, based on the company's 2024 Customer Service Report.
dr_question: With the reported slowdown in the sales of electric vehicles (EV), how can after sales products and customer service strategies help our company remain successful in 2026?
